attempt: Increase the finite RH-compatible stress observable and isolate the missing step: a theorem converting finite positivity or Mertens-type control into all-height zeta-zero control.

bounded_result.direct_counterexample_route: No certified off-critical zeta zero was produced.
bounded_result.no_counterexample_route: A full proof still requires a tail-uniform all-zero theorem.
bounded_result.contrapositive_route: An off-critical zero must imply a bounded failed positivity witness; that bridge is open.

obstruction: Finite Mertens stress remains compatible with RH and cannot decide the zeta zero set.
candidate_theorem: A formal tail bridge maps any off-critical zero to a finite positivity violation while controlling every remaining zero contribution.
next_experiment: Search symbolic tail majorants that survive surrogate off-critical zero red-team tests.
claim_boundary: No RH proof and no certified RH counterexample.
